steps.title: Identify the subject of the relative clause
steps.content: The blank appears in a relative clause: “a writing technique that ______ emphasis.” The relative pronoun that is the subject and refers to the singular noun antimetabole.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires a singular subject to use a singular verb. Creates is the only singular form.

The other choices violate this rule: create and are creating are plural forms, and have created uses have instead of has. That matches choice D — D is correct.
